snippet.title: Tikkende tijdbom: de volgende mega-aardbeving
snippet.description:
Precies tien jaar geleden kreeg Japan een van de zwaarste aardbevingen ooit over zich heen, met een tsunami en een kernramp erbovenop. De vraag is: waar komt de volgende mega-aardbeving? Want dat die komt, dat is zeker. Leggen we je uit. 

Luister ook naar onze podcast, Lang verhaal kort, in je favoriete podcast-app! Ook op Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/3Ab6DGFJL7VE5ToIH4r6w1?si=DqrwE6L2TvOb99FF1D2d3A

Meer video’s? Abonneer je op ons kanaal en praat mee! https://bit.ly/2PJk8Xg

Volg NOS op 3 ook op Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nosop3

We bedanken hoogleraar seismologie Arwen Deuss van de Universiteit Utrecht voor haar deskundige feedback op het script. In deze video van de Universiteit van Nederland legt zij uit waarom de wetenschap nog niet zo ver is dat het kan voorspellen wanneer aardbevingen gebeuren: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q-E5PoOE8Q0 

Muziek:
Noria - 'Seashore'
Rujay - 'Bad Dreams'
Rujay - 'On Ice'

---------------------------------------------------------------

● VRAGEN/TIPS/IDEEËN? We horen graag wat jij van het nieuws en onze uitleg vindt, laat je horen in de comments! Of mail ons: nosop3@nos.nl 

● VOLG ONS OOK HIER: Facebook: https://facebook.com/nosop3 Twitter: http://twitter.com/nosop3

___________________________________________________

De NOS is de grootste nieuwsorganisatie van Nederland. Bij NOS op 3 vind je elke zaterdag nieuws dat je niet mag hebben gemist. Wij gaan voor jou op onderzoek uit naar nieuws uit jouw wereld. Ook vind je hier uitleg bij het nieuws.

#Japan #aardbeving

en.title: The next megathrust earthquake, when?
en.description: Exactly ten years ago, Japan suffered one of the worst earthquakes ever, with a tsunami and a nuclear disaster on top. The question is, where will the next mega earthquake be? Because it will come, that's for sure.

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

Lyrics LGHADI WEHDOU : 

الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة .. واه ألالة  
الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة فين غابو عليك الصيادة 

واا لي ما عندو المال ما يتزوج وااه الالة 
واا لي ما عندو المال ما يتزوج ما يجيب بنات الرجالة 

وا الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة .. واه ألالة 
و الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة فين غابو عليك الصيادة 

وا الكلام لي قلت أنا وياك واااه ألالة 
الكلام لي قلت انا وياك أش قالو فيه الدواية 

وا الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة .. واه ألالة 
و الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة فين غابو عليك الصيادة 

أنا والزين ما نتفرقوش وا ه يا لالة 
ويلا الفراق جا جابو مولانا 

وا الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة .. واه ألالة 
و الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة فين غابو عليك الصيادة 

الزين امازيغ ايرا لقلبي واه ايا مركي 
انت نوكان ايلان تيكي واه ايا وينوي 

وا الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة .. واه ألالة 
و الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة في غابو عليك الصيادة 

يهديك الله أ لغادي وحدو واه أ لالة 
يهديك الله أ لغادي وحدو  ياك أنا نمشي بهوايا 

وا الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة .. واه ألالة 
و الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة في غابو عليك الصيادة 

للا نزهة يا ضي عيني واه ا للا 
للا نزهة يا ميمتي و للي بغيتيه نديرو غير رضاي عليا

وا هيا مول الحكايم 
سيدي عبد الله بلحساين

وا ضيف الله  أ مول المراح
هاكا حمادا تال الصباح 

 وا هاكا حمادا تال الصباح 
وا هاكا حمادا تال الصباح


#Saad_Lamjarred #LGHADI_WEHDOU #سعد_لمجرد

snippet.title: GRAMMYs 2021: Harry Styles Sings Watermelon Sugar in ELECTRIFYING Performance
snippet.description:
Harry Styles can take a bow after his first award win and debut performance at the 63rd annual GRAMMY Awards, which aired on CBS. The 27-year-old singer won Best Pop Solo Performance for his song 'Watermelon Sugar,' which he performed live earlier in the broadcast. Harry's first GRAMMY win was met with applause from his fellow nominees, including Billie Eilish and Taylor Swift, who dated Harry in 2012.

#GRAMMYs2021

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Miley Cyrus - Angels Like You (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Miley’s New Album Plastic Hearts is Available Now: https://mileyl.ink/PlasticHearts
 
View merch at Miley’s official store now! https://smarturl.it/MileyStore?iQid=yt

Instagram: https://mileyl.ink/instagram 
Snapchat: https://mileyl.ink/snapchat 
Tiktok: https://mileyl.ink/tiktok 
Site: http://www.mileycyrus.com

LYRICS
Flowers in hand, waiting for me 
Every word in poetry 
Won’t call me by name, only baby 
The more that you give the less that I 
Need everyone says I look happy 
When it feels right

I know that you’re wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
‘Cause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And it’s not you’re fault I can’t be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you can’t fly down here with me 
I’m everything they said I would be

(La La la)
I’m everything they said I would be

I’ll put you down slow
Love you goodbye 
before you let go, just one more time
Take off you’re clothes
pretend that it’s fine
A little more hurt won’t kill you 
tonight mama says you don’t look happy 
Close your eyes 

I know that you’re wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
‘Cause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And it’s not you’re fault I can’t be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you can’t fly down here with me 
I’m everything they said I would be

I know that you’re wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
‘Cause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And it’s not you’re fault I can’t be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you can’t fly down here with me 
I’m everything they said I would be

snippet.title: Covid-19 : plusieurs manifestations anti-confinement en Europe avec des heurts
snippet.description:
Des manifestations ont rassemblé, samedi, des milliers de personnes en Allemagne, en Suisse, en Grande-Bretagne, en Bulgarie ou encore en Autriche pour dénoncer la "dictature" des restrictions sanitaires contre la pandémie de Covid-19. Des heurts ont notamment éclaté avec la police à Londres et dans la ville allemande de Cassel.

snippet.title: « Je me souviens » (clip gestes barrières)
snippet.description:
En réponse au défi du président de la république, nous avons effectué cette chanson et ce clip. 
Rappel : si cette vidéo atteint les 10 MILLIONS de vues, on obtient un concours d’anecdotes avec le président.
Chanson disponible partout : Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer, Limewire, Emule, etc.
Les gestes barrières sont importants pour vous et vos proches, essayez de les respecter au max, on sait que ça commence à faire long mais on va y arriver tous ensemble. Prenez soin de vous et de moi.
Merci pour votre soutien dans cette aventure folle.
Tous les sous générés par les vidéos autour de ce projet ainsi que par la chanson seront investis dans les Agoraé (épiceries solidaires) pour les étudiants, afin qu'ils puissent se nourrir, tout simplement.


À notre équipe : vous avez assuré de ouf, dans des délais invraisemblables. Et les rires. Et l’efficacité. Et le mec chelou qui est venu pendant le playback défense 1. Merci la team on vous aime.

Compo & Paroles : Pacfly et Marlito
Arrangements : Martin Bonami
Prise et mix : Martin Bonami
Martin Bonami : Martin Bonami

Réalisateur : Florent Sabatier 
OPV : Ugo Tsvetoukhine
Assistant caméra : Pierre Guiraud
Chef OPS : Martin Bonami
Chef Maquilleuse : Kim Desnoyers

Régisseur général : Mamadou Wadiou

Merci à Sebastien Lixandru pour la très belle photo de la vignette ! @sebastienlxd sur Insta 

Directrice de production : Clara Lesage 
Chargée de production : Cécile Heckel 
Assistante de production : Camille Blondeau
Stagiaire de production : Jade Villain 

Chef Monteur : Florian Hautekiet
Mixeur : Martin Bonami
Vignette : Antoine Moodmaker

Avec Franjo et Marie Coustaury-Sabatier

PLANIPRESSE / CAUVY / CINQUIÈME ÉTOILE

Remerciements : Aurélien Le Draoullec, Célio, L'hôtel la villa des Ternes, La ferme de Gally, la Pharmacie du Château Villiers à Levallois-Perret.

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Wednesday, March 3, Starship serial number (SN10) successfully completed SpaceX’s third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps were actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enabled a precise landing at the intended location. SN10’s Raptor engines reignited as the vehicle performed the landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad! 

As if the flight test was not exciting enough, SN10 experienced a rapid unscheduled disassembly shortly after landing. These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: What if the World turned to Gold? - The Gold Apocalypse
snippet.description:
The Map of Evolution and other sciency posters, researched and designed with love, are now available on the kurzgesagt shop. 
Your purchase will support us directly and keep our videos free for everyone. 
►► https://shop.kurzgesagt.org
(Worldwide Shipping Available)

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sourcesgoldapocalypse/

Let us explore the scientific mystery of what would happen to you, if Earth suddenly turned into gold! The “Midaspocalypse”, based on the ancient tale of King Midas who was cursed so everything he touched turned into gold.

snippet.title: Grand Corps Malade & Louane "Derrière le brouillard"
snippet.description:
Produit par Jean-Rachid * "Derrière le brouillard" de Grand Corps Malade & Louane 
Réalisé par Mehdi Idir dit Minos 

Titre disponible sur l'album MESDAMES de Grand Corps Malade (Label Anouche Productions)
Auteur : Grand Corps Malade / Compositeur : Mosimann

Label : Anouche Productions (Jean-Rachid, Caroline Saulnier, Milan Kallouche & Samuel Cohen)
Louane apparait avec l'aimable autorisation de Island/Def Jam, un label Universal Music France 
Production Exécutive : Champions Télévision (Arnaud Chautard)                
Directrice de Production : Mona Chouchane
Chargé de Production : Jordhan Fillion
Assistante de Production : Laura Giovannoni
Régisseur : Adrien de Temmermann                                                
Chef Opérateur Bellevilloise : Son Doan
1ere Assistant Caméra : Alexandre Cabane   
Electricien : Léon Morteux
Assistant Electricien : Alexandre Ries
Cadreur Spécialisé : Sacha Naceri
Opérateur Drone : Damien Vicart
Cadreur Drone : Antony Debarre
Tourbus : Carriage / Alexia Beyaert
Road : Quentin Gratacos
Yanis Ainine
We Are Road
M.U.A Grand Corps Malade : Aurélie Lajeune
Maquillage Louane : Lorelen Coriton 
Coiffeur Louane : Rudy Marmet (Call My Agent)
VFX : Mikael Tanguy / Umedia
Étalonnage : Umedia

Merci Mosimann et Tristan Mazire

Remerciements :
Un immense merci à la ville de Boulogne Sur Mer, et tous les habitants
À la Ville de Saint Denis, Farida Tagredj, Florian Hernandez et tous les habitants. 
À Guillaume Barillon de l’Hôtel Métropole
À Camille et Alix de La Bellevilloise 
À Malaury et Romain d’Acc&Led
À Charlotte Jacotte, Clara Green, Aline Gaillot, Quentin Boissiere, Benjamin Picard, Amir Chenaoui, Mike Etienne, Julie Cabanel, Sabrina Chabani, Louana Chalon,  Léopold Court, Aude Le Vilain, Elodie Le Mercié, Lucy Duquesne, Nour El Bernoussi, Janet Erkin, Justine Font, Gabriel Guerrin, Tara Guyard, Raechel Isolda, Kévin Jaillat, Romain Joubert, Gustave Laquerre, Messiane Lievin, Ambre Maffei, Matéo Martin, Florence Mendez, Romane Miccoli, Mamari, Marine Perez, Alice Pierron, Camille Pradier, Remy Ros, Michael Sirvent, Sandrine Sirvent, Caroline Werner

℗2020 Anouche Productions

snippet.title: Snelle & Maan - Blijven Slapen
snippet.description:
Download / Stream "Blijven Slapen" nu overal via: https://Snelle.lnk.to/BlijvenSlapen

Vandaag brengen Snelle en Maan hun song 'Blijven Slapen' uit. De twee artiesten ontmoetten elkaar vorig jaar tijdens De Vrienden Van Amstel LIVE! en sindsdien ontstond er een hechte vriendschap. Het nummer schreven zij dan ook samen bij Snelle thuis. 'Blijven Slapen' gaat over het herkenbare gevoel van de spanning tijdens het daten: ga ik voor de zekerheid alvast mijn tandenborstel en ondergoed diep onderin mijn tas inpakken? Dit catchy lied zal ervoor zorgen dat jij niet stil kan blijven zitten. 'Blijven Slapen' zal op Snelle's album 'Lars' komen te staan, dat op 12 maart verschijnt. De song is vanaf vandaag te beluisteren op alle online streamingplatforms en de oplettende kijker kan in de bijbehorende videoclip een cameo vinden van niemand minder dan Chantal Janzen. 

Video credits:

Production: Muyu Media
Director: Tim Ro
Producer: Daniel Ro
Concept: Tim and Daniel Ro
Co-Producer: Marcel Morcus

DOP: Casper van Oort
Production Designer: Lisa Barnhoorn
Art Director: Peggy Gietema
Gaffer: Wiegert deVries

Editor: Djarno van den Bergh
Colorist: Qianwei Tong @Captcha

1st AD: Roy Merkelbach

2nd AC: Dylan Stoel
Best Girl: Tara Bisoen

Production Assistant: Moohyun Chang
Styling Maan: Diana Theys
Styling Snelle: Nga Ho
Styling Assistant: Jihane El Haddr
MUA: Marvin Lumoneka
Hairstylist: Siko van Berkel
Assistant HS: Renee Kuypers

Dance Choreography: SERIÓÓS  
Dancers: Meis Köster, Jasmin Deekman, Aristos Latrou, Roselie van Herk, Jinko Wu, David Cham

Volg Snelle hier: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MCSnelle/​ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mcsnelle/​ 

Volg Maan hier:

En volg ook ROQ ’N ROLLA Music:

nl.title: Snelle & Maan - Blijven Slapen
nl.description:
Download / Stream "Blijven Slapen" nu overal via: https://Snelle.lnk.to/BlijvenSlapen

Vandaag brengen Snelle en Maan hun song 'Blijven Slapen' uit. De twee artiesten ontmoetten elkaar vorig jaar tijdens De Vrienden Van Amstel LIVE! en sindsdien ontstond er een hechte vriendschap. Het nummer schreven zij dan ook samen bij Snelle thuis. 'Blijven Slapen' gaat over het herkenbare gevoel van de spanning tijdens het daten: ga ik voor de zekerheid alvast mijn tandenborstel en ondergoed diep onderin mijn tas inpakken? Dit catchy lied zal ervoor zorgen dat jij niet stil kan blijven zitten. 'Blijven Slapen' zal op Snelle's album 'Lars' komen te staan, dat op 12 maart verschijnt. De song is vanaf vandaag te beluisteren op alle online streamingplatforms en de oplettende kijker kan in de bijbehorende videoclip een cameo vinden van niemand minder dan Chantal Janzen.
